column1: PV Number is generated for all such reports for the day -- YYYYMMDD<Serial Number for the Report>
Net Credit - Settled Transactions - Refund Transactions - Chargeback Transactions
Settled Transactions -- order based on the transaction timestamp [descending order]
Refund Transactions -- order based on the refund timestamp [descending order]
Chargeback Transactions -- order based on the chargeback timestamp [descending order]
Please store the gross amount, charges amount, tds amount, net amount fields in the system
Filler -- remains NA if there is no update done as per Settlement File Upload, else it will display the Filler field
